question: In Wix, how do you add a list section to a blank page and what placeholder content appears?
answer: Click the 'Add Section' button in the center of the blank page, then select 'List' from the left sidebar menu. This adds a section displaying a placeholder 'Header Title' and three 'List Item Title' entries with descriptions.
keypoints: The user clicks on the 'Add Section' button located in the center of the blank page within the Wix website editor interface.
The user selects the 'List' option from the left sidebar menu, which is highlighted and displayed as an available section type.
The list section is added to the webpage, displaying a placeholder text labeled 'Header Title' and three 'List Item Title' entries with corresponding descriptions.

question: In Wix, what steps are required to edit the header title of a newly added list section to 'Software Tutorials'?
answer: Click the 'Edit' button above the list section to enable editing, then type 'Software Tutorials' into the 'Header Title' field to replace the placeholder text.
keypoints: The user clicks on the 'Edit' button located above the newly added list section, enabling editing options for the header title and list items.
The user types 'Software Tutorials' into the 'Header Title' field, updating the placeholder text accordingly.

question: In Wix, how do you modify the first list item to display 'Adobe After Effects' and add its description?
answer: Click the first 'List Item Title' entry and type 'Adobe After Effects' to replace the default text. Then click the description area below it and type the relevant content.
keypoints: The user clicks on the first 'List Item Title' entry and types 'Adobe After Effects', replacing the default placeholder text.
The user adds a description under the 'Adobe After Effects' list item by clicking on the description area and typing relevant content.

question: In Wix, what is the outcome of clicking the 'Publish' button, and what content appears on the final webpage?
answer: Clicking the 'Publish' button at the top-right corner initiates publishing. The published webpage displays the updated content, including the 'Software Tutorials' header and the 'Adobe After Effects' list item with its description.
keypoints: The user clicks on the 'Publish' button located at the top-right corner of the Wix editor interface, initiating the publishing process for the webpage.
The user views the final published webpage, which displays the updated content including the 'Software Tutorials' header and the 'Adobe After Effects' list item with its description.
